# Stock Move Common Destination

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:2390d75f4694d2211c13d3f416931745bc34318627d4f2ba2ff92b2f82cbe88f
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds a M2m field `common_dest_move_ids` on `stock.move` in order
to compute all the moves having a chained destination move sharing the same
picking as the actual move's destination move.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_move_common_dest.tests.test_move_common_dest.TestCommonMoveDest.test_compute_common_dest_move_ids_on_new_record
documentation:
Discovered while testing MRP with code such as:

```
with Form(cls.env["mrp.production"]) as mo_form:
    mo_form.product_id = cls.product
```

This call \_compute_common_dest_move_ids on a new instance
(without stock_move db record)
